name: Garlic Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the bread into 1/2-inch slices, but do not cut all the way through to the crust.
2. In a small bowl, combine the remaining ingredients until smooth.
3. Spread the mixture between each slice and on the top of the bread.
4. Place in a bread basket or wrap in paper toweling.
5. Heat in Microwave Oven for 30 to 45 seconds.
